title: Full of Nomads - Bali
description: The first stop of my Oasis trip is London, where I spent a few days exploring the city and finally have a chance to see Oasis in person.
coverAlt: Snow-capped peaks of the Matterhorn dominating the skyline of Zermatt

images.alt: Oasis performing at Wembley Stadium, with a sea of fans in the background
images.caption: Twin builidings of the Petronas Towers in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, standing tall against a dark sky.
